title: Ethereal Tomes
description: Ethereal Tomes is a mod that introduces a mana system and magical tomes into your game. These tomes offer various magical abilities and effects.
body:
# Ethereal Tomes

Ethereal Tomes is a mystical mod that weaves the very essence of magic into your gameplay experience. Step into your Minecraft world with these magical tomes that prove invaluable in many situations, including combat.

This mod introduces a Mana System with two variants: **Mana** and **Ethereal Mana**. While Mana is self-explanatory, Ethereal Mana is an advanced type of mana that regenerates exclusively near Ethereal Crystals. When it starts to regenerate, brace yourself for the influx of massive amounts of Ethereal Mana, accompanied by increased normal mana regeneration. Ethereal Mana has a remarkably high cap, so you can collect abundant amounts without the worry of it randomly draining during battles!

As the name suggests, Ethereal Tomes take center stage alongside the regular tomes. These extraordinary books are mostly upgraded or completely new and powerful versions of existing tomes. Ethereal Tomes can utilize both your normal mana and ethereal mana, or solely rely on the ethereal mana's potent energy.

In addition, the mod introduces a few more items:

- **Ambrosia**: Increases your Max Mana.
- **Ethereal Stone**: Enhances the Mana Regeneration Bonus. (both Normal and Ethereal Mana.)
- **Mana Orb**: Replenishes a small amount of mana, proving handy when your mana supply is low.

<sub>This mod is exclusive to my Modrinth profile.</sub>
